_meta.description: Conversion table for Way of the Stonefist. Keys are lowercase keyword patterns matched against modifier stat text.
sources: Example 1: Fine Bracers (DEX rare) -> Fists of Stone
Example 2: Knightly Mitts (STR rare) -> Fists of Stone
Example 3: Treefingers (STR unique) -> Fists of Stone
Example 4: Hand of Wisdom and Action (DEX/INT unique) -> Fists of Stone
Example 5: Maelstrom Talons (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 84) -> Fists of Stone
Example 6: Blood Mitts (Secured Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 7: Agony Mitts (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 8: Eagle Knuckle (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 9: Empyrean Touch (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 10: Mind Palm (Knightly Mitts, STR rare, ilvl 68) -> Fists of Stone
Example 11: Damnation Clutches (Knightly Mitts, STR rare, ilvl 80) -> Fists of Stone
Example 12: Onslaught Caress (Secured Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 80) -> Fists of Stone
Example 13: Pain Hold (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 81) -> Fists of Stone
Example 14: Damnation Caress (Vaal Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82, +20% quality) -> Fists of Stone
Example 15: Horror Fist (Adorned Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 80) -> Fists of Stone
Example 16: Empyrean Talons (Blacksteel Gauntlets, STR/DEX rare, ilvl 80) -> Fists of Stone
Example 17: Dragon Mitts (Stalking Bracers, DEX rare, ilvl 71) -> Fists of Stone
Example 18: Vengeance Hand (Knightly Mitts, STR rare, ilvl ~65) -> Fists of Stone
Example 19: Gloom Touch (Grim Gloves, INT rare, ilvl ~65) -> Fists of Stone
Example 20: Agony Hand (Elegant Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 72) -> Fists of Stone
Example 21: Golem Paw (Barbed Bracers, DEX rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 22: Sorrow Fingers (Secured Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 82) -> Fists of Stone
Example 23: Apocalypse Paw (Steelmail Gauntlets, STR/DEX rare, ilvl 75) -> Fists of Stone
Example 24: Eagle Grasp (Stalking Bracers, DEX rare, ilvl 77) -> Fists of Stone
Example 25: Woe Vise (Knightly Mitts, STR rare, ilvl 78) -> Fists of Stone
Example 26: Vengeance Claw (Barbed Bracers, DEX rare, ilvl 79) -> Fists of Stone
Example 27: Skull Clutches (Steelmail Gauntlets, STR/DEX rare, ilvl 80, +7% quality) -> Fists of Stone
Example 28: Spirit Claw (War Wraps, DEX/INT rare, ilvl 73) -> Fists of Stone
key_patterns: UNIQUE vs RARE: Unique mods follow item-specific conversion rules, not generic ones
Flat vs % defence stats convert DIFFERENTLY (flat Armour splits into 2 per-level mods; % increased Armour → single % more mod)
Resource thresholds: Life → on Low Life bonus; Mana → on Low Mana bonus
Attack stats → Cast stats (Attack Speed → Cast Speed, same % value)
CC buildup → different CC buildup (Stun → Immobilisation, ratio ~0.72)
Keystones → different keystones (Giant's Blood → Hollow Palm Technique)
Critical Hit triggers → preserve % chance, change effect type
Flat Armour → per-level EVA + per-level ES (split, both stacking with Fists of Stone base implicit)
Strength (flat) → increased Area of Effect for Attacks (ratio ~1.25x)
per 20 [Attribute] mods: the attribute SWAPS (DEX ↔ INT on HoWA unique)

CRITICAL: Original base type implicits SURVIVE conversion — Fists of Stone implicits are ADDED alongside them (confirmed Elegant Wraps 18% Armour/EVA/ES implicit persisted + 2 new Fists implicits added)

increased evasion rating.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased evasion rating.example: 75% increased Evasion Rating → 15% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield

increased armour.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased armour.formula: TIER-BASED: T1 (~92-100%) → 19%; T4-T5 (~51%) → 13%. Not a fixed divisor — ÷5 fits T1, ÷4 fits lower tier.
increased armour.example: RARE T1 (Damnation Clutches, str): 96% → 19% more EVA+ES. RARE lower tier (Knightly Mitts?): 51% → 13% more EVA+ES.
increased armour.note: % increased Armour → single % more EVA+ES (unlike flat Armour which splits). Output % is TIER-BASED, not a fixed ratio. T1→19%, T4-T5→13%. The apparent ÷4 or ÷5 difference reflects different tiers, not a formula change.

to armour.converted_stat: Has +X to Evasion Rating per player level + Has +Y to maximum Energy Shield per player level
to armour.formula: TIER-BASED (STR pure): T6 → +1 EVA/level; T?(+84) → +2 EVA/level; T3 (+127-145) → +4 EVA/level; T1 likely higher. ES/level fixed at +1. STR/DEX bases: Armour may contribute ONLY +1 ES/level (no EVA, since DEX side covers Evasion).
to armour.example: RARE T6 (Mind Palm, str): +42 → +1 EVA/level + +1 ES/level. RARE T? (Knightly Mitts): +84 → +2 EVA/level + +1 ES/level. RARE T3 (Damnation Clutches/Vengeance Hand, str): +127 and +145 both → +4 EVA/level + +1 ES/level. RARE STR/DEX (Skull Clutches): +60 Armour T1 + +48 Evasion T2 → combined '+4 EVA/level + +1 ES/level' (Armour contributes ES only? Evasion contributes EVA?).
split_outputs: Has +X to Evasion Rating per player level (STR pure tier-based: T6→+1, T?→+2, T3→+4, T1→higher; may be 0 on STR/DEX)
Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level (fixed at +1 regardless of tier; present on all bases)
to armour.note: CRITICAL: Flat Armour converts to per-level bonuses that appear as IMPLICITS and STACK ADDITIVELY with the base Fists of Stone implicits (+3 EVA/level + +1 ES/level). Vengeance Hand showed 4 implicit lines: base (+3 EVA + +1 ES) PLUS converted (+4 EVA + +1 ES). T3 range confirmed includes at least 127-145 (both give +4 EVA/level). ES/level always +1. STR/DEX HYPOTHESIS (Skull Clutches): on STR/DEX Steelmail, flat Armour T1(~60) + flat Evasion T2(~48) together showed only '+4 EVA + +1 ES' — suggesting Armour on STR/DEX contributes +0 EVA + +1 ES (DEX side handles EVA), while Evasion contributes +4 EVA. The two items' per-level outputs MERGED into one combined display. UNRESOLVED until isolated STR/DEX flat Armour example obtained.

to evasion rating.converted_stat: Has +X to Evasion Rating per player level
to evasion rating.formula: unknown — +48(65-78) flat EVA → +4 EVA/level (Eagle Knuckle rare, dex_int, CONFIRMED). Does NOT split into ES/level.
to evasion rating.example: RARE (Eagle Knuckle, dex_int): +48 to Evasion Rating → Has +4 to Evasion Rating per player level ONLY (no ES/level split). RARE STR/DEX (Skull Clutches, str_dex): +48 EVA T2 + flat Armour T1 → COMBINED display '+4 EVA/level + +1 ES/level' (merge behavior).
to evasion rating.note: Flat Evasion → EVA/level ONLY (confirmed Eagle Knuckle DEX/INT). CONTRAST with flat Armour which splits into BOTH EVA/level + ES/level. DEX base stat → DEX-side per-level only. Formula ratio ~48/4 = ÷12. STR/DEX MERGE BEHAVIOR (Skull Clutches): on a STR/DEX base, flat Armour T1 and flat Evasion T2 BOTH converted to per-level stats. Their contributions may have MERGED into a single combined display '+4 EVA/level + +1 ES/level'. Hypothesis: Armour contributes +0 EVA + +1 ES (on STR/DEX, DEX side already handles EVA), Evasion contributes +4 EVA → combined '+4 EVA + +1 ES'. OR both contribute equal EVA amounts that display merged. UNRESOLVED — need isolated STR/DEX flat Armour case.

to energy shield.converted_stat: Has +X to maximum Energy Shield per player level
to energy shield.formula: unknown — +25(22-25) flat ES → +1 ES/level (Eagle Knuckle rare, dex_int, CONFIRMED). Does NOT split into EVA/level.
to energy shield.example: RARE (Eagle Knuckle, dex_int): +25 to maximum Energy Shield → Has +1 to maximum Energy Shield per player level ONLY.
to energy shield.note: Flat Energy Shield → ES/level ONLY (confirmed Eagle Knuckle). INT base stat → INT-side per-level only. Ratio: 25/1 = ÷25. CONTRAST with flat Armour which splits into BOTH EVA/level + ES/level.

adds physical damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Physical Damage
adds physical damage to attacks.formula: TIER-BASED: T8→11%; T4(DEX/INT)→16%; T3(DEX Barbed, 14-20 range)→17%; T2(DEX Stalking, 18-26 range)→20%; T1→21%.
adds physical damage to attacks.example: RARE T8: max 3-6 → 11%. RARE T4 (Agony Hand, dex_int): rolled max=13(12-17) → 16%. RARE T3 (Vengeance Claw, Barbed Bracers dex): 9-18(14-20), max=18 → 17%. RARE T2 (Eagle Grasp, Stalking Bracers dex): rolled max=20(18-26) → 20%. RARE T1 (Secured Wraps/Steelmail): max 19-32 → 21% (confirmed across 2 base types). UNIQUE: max 13-23 → 24%.
adds physical damage to attacks.note: TIER-BASED: T8=11%, T4=16%, T3=17%, T2=20%, T1=21%. NOTE: Barbed Bracers T3(14-20) and Stalking Bracers T2(18-26) have overlapping ranges — different base types have different tier cutoffs. T3→T2 gap: +3% (despite overlap in value ranges). T2→T1 gap: +1%. Tier number determines output, not the raw value range.

maximum life.converted_stat: less damage taken while on Low Life (large values) OR Damage Taken Recouped as Life/Mana/ES (small values)
maximum life.formula: VALUE-BASED SPLIT at ~50 Life threshold. SMALL (<~50): TIER-BASED = Recoup% (DEX/INT); Low Life only (STR); POSSIBLY BOTH (INT pure). LARGE (50+): TIER-BASED +1%/tier → Low Life defense.
maximum life.example: SMALL DEX/INT: +29(26-32 tier range)→6% Recoup; +31→6% Recoup (same tier!); +39→7% Recoup. SMALL STR: +11→5% Low Life defense (NOT Recoup!). SMALL INT (Gloom Touch): +40→6% Low Life + 4% Recoup? (TENTATIVE). LARGE tier table (ALL CONFIRMED): T5(+61)→9%, T4(+84)→10%, T3(+95,85-99)→11%, T2(+101/118)→12%, T1(+126)→13% less dmg Low Life.
maximum life.note: LARGE LIFE TIER TABLE COMPLETE (5 tiers): T5=9%, T4=10%, T3=11%, T2=12%, T1=13% — clean +1% per tier step. SMALL LIFE: TIER-BASED confirmed — +29 AND +31 BOTH give 6% Recoup on DEX/INT base. Both fall in War Wraps T range 26-32, so the same tier → same output regardless of roll. Floor(29/5)=5≠6 but tier 26-32→6% ✓. The ÷5 formula was approximately correct but not exact. SMALL LIFE PATHS: (1) DEX/INT: TIER-BASED = Recoup; (2) STR: Low Life defense only; (3) INT pure: tentative split (unconfirmed). BASE TYPE MATTERS.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% of Damage Taken Recouped as Life, Mana and ES (if flat Life < 50)

to intelligence.converted_stat: increased Cooldown Recovery Rate (rare) OR increased Intelligence (unique)
to intelligence.formula: CONFLICTING DATA — likely tier-based lookup, NOT value-proportional. T1 INT (+31-33): → 10% CDR. EARLIER data: +22 INT → 21% CDR (Fine Bracers, tier unknown). UNIQUE: ~value * 0.35 (HoWA: +20 INT → 7% increased INT).
to intelligence.example: RARE T1 (Eagle Knuckle, dex_int): +32 INT → 10% CDR. RARE earlier example: +22 INT → 21% CDR (Fine Bracers). UNIQUE: +20 INT → 7% increased INT (HoWA).
to intelligence.note: CONTEXT-DEPENDENT. Rare: INT → CDR. Unique: INT → % increased INT. IMPORTANT: The two rare examples conflict (32→10 vs 22→21). Most likely explanation: the output CDR is determined by tier number, not raw value — and if lower-numbered tiers have lower CDR values in PoE2, T1 INT gives T1 CDR (10%) while a higher-numbered (lower rarity) tier gives a higher CDR value (21%). Needs more data.

maximum mana.converted_stat: more Attack damage while on Low Mana
maximum mana.example: RARE T5 (Damnation Clutches, str): +56(55-64) → 19%. RARE T2 (Dragon Mitts, dex): +97(90-104) → 24%. RARE T2 (Eagle Grasp, dex): +90(90-104, min roll) → 24% ✓. RARE T2 (Vengeance Claw, dex): +90(90-104) → 24% ✓ (THIRD T2 CONFIRM). RARE T1 (Horror Fist, dex_int): +105(105-124) → 27%.
maximum mana.note: Mana → Low Mana attack damage bonus. TIER-BASED. T2→24% confirmed on THREE different DEX-base items all rolling 90-97 within the 90-104 range. T1→27%, T5→19%. Range 90-104 is confirmed as T2 across DEX and DEX/INT bases.

to strength.converted_stat: increased Area of Effect for Attacks
to strength.formula: TIER-BASED: STR-base T3(28-30)→27%; STR-base T2(31-35?)→30%. DEX-base T?(+16)→20% (different tier system). NOT 'round to nearest 10' — +29 rounds to 30 but gives 27%.
to strength.example: DEX base (Fine Bracers, Example 1): +16 → 20% AoE. STR base T3 (Woe Vise, Knightly Mitts): +29(28-30) → 27% AoE. STR base T2? (Knightly Mitts, Example 2): +31 → 30% AoE.
to strength.note: TIER-BASED confirmed: +29 gives 27%, not 30% (ruling out 'round to nearest 10'). On STR base Knightly Mitts: T3(28-30)=27%, T2(31-35?)=30% (+3 per tier). +31 is at minimum of T2 range (31), +29 is T3 near max. DEX base (+16→20%) uses different tier ranges. Pattern: ~3% per tier on STR base.

to cold resistance.converted_stat: X% to Cold Resistance + +Y% to Maximum Cold Resistance
to cold resistance.formula: RARE: max_bonus threshold — input ≤20 → +1% max; input 21-40 → +2% max; input ≥41 → +3% max. Preserved flat: independent re-roll within output tier. UNIQUE: value÷2 (suspected by analogy with Fire/Lightning).
to cold resistance.example: RARE low (Agony Hand, dex_int): +16(16-20)% → +1% Max Cold + +24% Cold (16≤20→+1% ✓). RARE T2 (Sorrow Fingers, dex_int): +36(36-40)% → +2% Max Cold + +39% Cold (36∈21-40→+2% ✓; 36→39 gained 3). RARE (Fine Bracers): +32% → +32% kept + +2% Max Cold. RARE (Maelström Talons): +41% → +38% Cold + +3% Max Cold. UNIQUE: likely value÷2.
split_outputs: +X% to Cold Resistance (independent re-roll: 16→24 gained; 36→39 gained; 32→32 kept; 41→38 lost)
+Y% to Maximum Cold Resistance (threshold: input≤20 → +1%; input 21-40 → +2%; input≥41 → +3%)
to cold resistance.note: Max_bonus threshold CONFIRMED on 4 data points: ≤20→+1% (+16→+1% ✓); 21-40→+2% (+32,+36→+2% ✓); ≥41→+3% (+41→+3% ✓). Preserved flat: independent re-roll — can increase (16→24, 36→39) stay (32→32) or decrease (41→38).

to fire resistance.converted_stat: X% to Fire Resistance + +Y% to Maximum Fire Resistance
to fire resistance.formula: RARE: max_bonus threshold — input ≤20 → +1% max; input 21-40 → +2% max; input ≥41 → +3% max. Preserved flat: independent re-roll within output tier. UNIQUE: value÷2, rounded up (27→14, confirmed Damnation Palm).
to fire resistance.example: RARE low (Gloom Touch, INT): +17(13-17)% → +1% Max Fire + +24% Fire. RARE low (Agony Hand, dex_int): +19(16-20)% → +1% Max Fire + +22% Fire. RARE T3 (Eagle Grasp, dex): +34(31-35)% → +2% Max Fire + +33% Fire (34∈21-40→+2% ✓; 34→33 lost 1). RARE T1 (Maelström Talons): +43% → +36% Fire + +3% Max Fire. UNIQUE (Damnation Palm): +27% → +14% Fire + +2% Max Fire.
split_outputs: +X% to Fire Resistance (independent re-roll: 17→24 gained; 19→22 gained; 34→33 lost 1; 43→36 lost)
+Y% to Maximum Fire Resistance (threshold: input≤20 → +1%; input 21-40 → +2%; input≥41 → +3%)
to fire resistance.note: Max_bonus threshold CONFIRMED on 5 data points: ≤20→+1% (+17,+19 ✓); 21-40→+2% (+34 ✓); ≥41→+3% (+43 ✓). Preserved flat re-rolls: can gain (17→24, 19→22) or barely change (34→33) or lose (43→36). UNIQUE: value÷2 rounded up (confirmed).

to lightning resistance.converted_stat: X% to Lightning Resistance + +Y% to Maximum Lightning Resistance
to lightning resistance.formula: RARE: max_bonus threshold — input ≤20 → +1% max; input 21-40 → +2% max; input ≥41 → +3% max. Preserved flat: ANOMALOUS (37→40 GAINED 3; 41→39 lost 2). UNIQUE: value÷2 exact (40→20, Damnation Palm CONFIRMED).
to lightning resistance.example: RARE (Damnation Caress, dex_int): +37% Lightning → +40% Lightning + +2% Max Lightning (value INCREASED!). RARE T1 (Empyrean Touch): +41% Lightning → +39% + +3% Max Lightning. UNIQUE (Damnation Palm): +40% → +20% + +2% Max.
split_outputs: +X% to Lightning Resistance (preserved flat formula UNKNOWN — 37→40 gained; 41→39 lost)
+Y% to Maximum Lightning Resistance (threshold: input≤20 → +1%; input 21-40 → +2%; input≥41 → +3%)
to lightning resistance.note: Max_bonus threshold CONFIRMED ≤40→+2%, ≥41→+3%: tested at +37,+40 (both→+2%) and +41,+43 (both→+3%). Preserved flat is NOT strictly preserved — it appears to be an independent re-roll within the same output tier range. Horror Fist: +40(T1 max)→37; Damnation Caress: +37(T1 low)→40; Empyrean Touch: +41→39. Theory: Fists of Stone re-rolls within a similar-tier output range.

to chaos resistance.converted_stat: X% to Chaos Resistance + +Y% to Maximum Chaos Resistance
to chaos resistance.formula: RARE: max_bonus threshold — input ≤20 → +1% max; input 21-40 → +2% max; input ≥41 → +3% max. Preserved flat: independent re-roll.
to chaos resistance.example: RARE T2 (Eagle Grasp, dex): +20(20-23)% → +1% Max Chaos + +25% Chaos (20 EXACTLY at ≤20 boundary → +1% ✓; 20→25 gained 5). RARE T1 (Empyrean Touch, dex_int): +27% → +23% Chaos + +2% Max Chaos.
split_outputs: +X% to Chaos Resistance (independent re-roll: 20→25 gained; 27→23 lost)
+Y% to Maximum Chaos Resistance (threshold: input≤20 → +1%; input 21-40 → +2%; input≥41 → +3%)
to chaos resistance.note: Max_bonus threshold BOUNDARY CONFIRMED: input exactly 20 → +1% (≤20 check is inclusive). T2 Chaos range 20-23 always gives +1% max bonus (all values ≤23 are ≤20? No — only the T2 min roll 20 is exactly ≤20; rolls 21-23 would give +2%). Eagle Grasp rolled minimum (20), so ≤20→+1% boundary confirmed. Preserved flat: re-rolls independently.

to level of all melee skills.converted_stat: +X/2 to Level of all Melee Skills + +Y% to Quality of all Skills
to level of all melee skills.formula: level halved (rounded down); Quality % ~10-11% (slight variation observed)
to level of all melee skills.example: +2 to Level of all Melee Skills → +1 to Level of all Melee Skills + +11% to Quality of all Skills (Horror Grasp, CONFIRMED). Earlier example (Knightly Mitts): +10% Quality.
split_outputs: +X to Level of all Melee Skills (value halved)
+10 to +11% to Quality of all Skills (slight variation)
to level of all melee skills.note: Two confirmed examples both give +1 from +2 input. Quality output: 10% (Knightly Mitts) vs 11% (Horror Grasp) — small discrepancy, possibly tier-based or within output range.

attack speed.example: 5% reduced Attack Speed → 5% reduced Cast Speed
attack speed.note: Attack Speed converts to Cast Speed preserving the exact % value. Pattern: attack stat → cast stat.

stun buildup.example: 29% increased Stun Buildup → 21% increased Immobilisation buildup
stun buildup.note: CC buildup stat → different CC buildup stat. Stun is a form of Immobilisation.

gain arcane surge.converted_stat: chance to gain a Power Charge on Critical Hit
gain arcane surge.formula: Output is FIXED at 10% regardless of input. Normal mod (10%) → 10%; Desecrated T1 (12%, range 10-15%) → 10%.
gain arcane surge.example: NORMAL (Knightly Mitts, str): 10% Arcane Surge on Crit → 10% Power Charge on Crit. DESECRATED T1 (Sorrow Fingers, dex_int): 12(10-15)% → 10% Power Charge on Crit (higher input, same output).
gain arcane surge.note: Power Charge on Critical Hit is a fixed-value mod in PoE2 (always 10%). The Desecrated version rolls 10-15% on input but ALWAYS outputs 10% — the higher Desecrated roll is lost. This means Desecrated Arcane Surge → Power Charge conversion has NO advantage over the normal version despite a higher input range.

giant's blood.note: Keystones convert to thematically related keystones. STR-themed keystone → Martial Artist/unarmed keystone.

to dexterity (unique howa).example: +20 to Dexterity → 11% increased Dexterity (Hand of Wisdom and Action unique)
to dexterity (unique howa).note: UNIQUE ITEM specific (HoWA only). On RARE DEX/INT gloves the conversion is DIFFERENT: flat DEX → Surpassing chance to fire an additional Projectile. See 'to dexterity' entry. Formula: +20 flat → 11% increased.

increased energy shield.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased energy shield.formula: value / 5 (rounds to nearest): 38% → 8% more Global EVA+ES (38/5=7.6→8)
increased energy shield.example: RARE (Gloom Touch, Grim Gloves INT): 38% increased Energy Shield → 8% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield (CONFIRMED)
increased energy shield.note: CONFIRMED ÷5 same as increased Evasion Rating. INT base (pure Energy Shield stat) converts to EVA+ES combined output at same ÷5 ratio. Round half-up: 38/5=7.6→8.

adds fire damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
adds fire damage to attacks.formula: TIER-BASED: T8(max~3)→11%; T7(max 13, 10-13 range, War Wraps)→12%; T5→14%; T4→16%; T3(DEX Barbed, max 31, 27-32 range)→18%; T2→19-20%; T1→23%.
adds fire damage to attacks.example: RARE T8: max~3 → 11%. RARE T7 (Spirit Claw, War Wraps dex_int): max=13(10-13) → 12% (NEW). RARE T5 (Damnation Caress, dex_int): max~18 → 14%. RARE T4 (Woe Vise, Knightly Mitts str): max=22(21-26) → 16%. RARE T3 (Vengeance Claw, Barbed Bracers dex): 13-31(27-32), max=31 → 18%. RARE T2 (Blacksteel str_dex): max~34 → 19%. RARE T2 (Elegant Wraps dex_int): rolled 34(33-36) → 20%. RARE T1 (Maelström Talons, dex_int): max~40 → 23%.
adds fire damage to attacks.note: Elemental type PRESERVED: Fire → Extra Fire. TIER-BASED: T8=11%, T7=12%, ..., T5=14%, T4=16%, T3=18% — clean +1%/tier at low end (T8→T7), clean +2%/tier at high end (T5→T4→T3). T2=19-20% (varies by base: Blacksteel→19, Elegant Wraps→20), T1=23%. T7 confirmed on War Wraps DEX/INT (max 13, range 10-13). Predicted series: T8=11%, T7=12%, T6=13%, T5=14% — then gap to T4=16%.

adds cold damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Cold Damage
adds cold damage to attacks.formula: TIER-BASED: low(max~7)→11%; War Wraps T3(max 10, 9-11 range)→12%; T6(max~14)→13%; T4 DEX(max 18)→16%; T~2 unique(max~18)→17%; T3 DEX/INT(max 22)→17%; T2 STR(max 28, 25-31 range)→19%; T1(max~37)→21%
adds cold damage to attacks.example: RARE low (Dragon Mitts, dex): max~7 → 11%. RARE T3 (Spirit Claw, War Wraps dex_int): max=10(9-11) → 12% (NEW). RARE T6 (Pain Hold, dex_int): max~14 → 13%. RARE T4 (Golem Paw, dex): rolled max=18 → 16%. UNIQUE max~18 → 17%. RARE T3 (Sorrow Fingers, dex_int): rolled max=22 → 17%. RARE T2 (Woe Vise, Knightly Mitts str): 16-28(25-31), rolled max=28 → 19%. RARE T1 (Damnation Caress, dex_int): max~37 → 21%.
adds cold damage to attacks.note: Elemental type PRESERVED: Cold → Extra Cold. TIER-BASED: 8 data points. War Wraps T3 (max 10, range 9-11) → 12% fills gap between max~7→11% and max~14→13%. NOTE: T3 on War Wraps (range 9-11) vs T3 on Vaal/Secured Wraps (range ~20-22) are VERY different tiers of the same mod with different tier ranges per base type. Progression: max~7→11%, max~10→12%, max~14→13%, max~18→16%, max~22→17%, max~28→19%, max~37→21%.

adds lightning damage to attacks.converted_stat: Attacks Gain ?% of Damage as Extra Lightning Damage
adds lightning damage to attacks.formula: VALUE-BASED (scales with max damage range): max~25→13%; max~37→16%; max~41→20%(unique); max~70→23%
adds lightning damage to attacks.example: RARE DEX T1 (Dragon Mitts, dex): max~25 → 13%. RARE T4 (Empyrean Touch): max~37 → 16%. UNIQUE: max~41 → 20%. RARE T1 (Pain Hold, dex_int): max~70 → 23%.
adds lightning damage to attacks.note: Elemental type PRESERVED: Lightning → Extra Lightning. VALUE-BASED: four data points confirm higher max damage → higher %. NOTE: 'T1' varies by base type — DEX Stalking Bracers T1 max=23-27 while DEX/INT Vaal Wraps T1 max=60-71. Different base types have very different mod pools!

life per enemy hit with attacks.converted_stat: Gain X Life per Enemy Hit with Attacks if you have dealt a Critical Hit Recently
life per enemy hit with attacks.formula: value ~2.8x: 5 → 14 (rare, CONFIRMED); UNIQUE: ~2.6x: 5 → 13 (Damnation Palm). Critical Hit condition added.
life per enemy hit with attacks.example: RARE (Agony Mitts, dex_int): Gain 5 Life per Enemy Hit → Gain 14 Life per Enemy Hit if Critical Hit Recently. UNIQUE (Damnation Palm): 5 → 13.
life per enemy hit with attacks.note: Life on Hit → more Life on Hit but requires Critical Hit Recently condition. Rare multiplier ~2.8x; unique multiplier ~2.6x. Small discrepancy may be rounding or unique vs rare difference.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value} Life per Enemy Hit if Critical Hit Recently

increased attack speed.converted_stat: chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Hit
increased attack speed.example: RARE T3 (Golem Paw, dex): 10(8-10)% → 16% Onslaught. RARE T2 (Apocalypse Paw, str_dex): 12(11-13)% → 20% Onslaught. RARE T1~(Agony Mitts, dex_int): 15% → 28% Onslaught.
increased attack speed.note: TIER-BASED confirmed on 3 data points: T3=16%, T2=20%, T1=28%. Spacing non-linear: T3→T2=+4, T2→T1=+8. Note: DEX-type conversion rule. STR-type unique (Treefingers): Attack Speed → Cast Speed (different rule entirely). Base type: both DEX and STR/DEX give same tier outputs for same tier ranks.

increased cast speed.example: 13% increased Cast Speed → 13% increased Attack Speed (Demon Stitcher unique)
increased cast speed.note: Cast Speed ↔ Attack Speed swap is BIDIRECTIONAL. Attack Speed → Cast Speed on Treefingers (confirmed); Cast Speed → Attack Speed confirmed on Demon Stitcher. Value preserved in both directions.

increased evasion and energy shield.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased evasion and energy shield.formula: VALUE-BASED (ceil(value/5)): 67%→14% (ceil 13.4=14 ✓); 75%→15% (ceil 15.0=15 ✓); 98%→20% (ceil 19.6=20 ✓). UNCERTAIN: 91%→17% (ceil 18.2=19 ≠17 — may be misread). LOW TIERS (≤35%) → NO visible output CONFIRMED.
increased evasion and energy shield.example: RARE T4 (Agony Hand, dex_int): 67(56-67)% → 14% (ceil(67/5)=14 ✓). RARE T1 (Sorrow Fingers, Secured Wraps dex_int): 98(92-100)% → 20% (ceil(98/5)=20 ✓). UNIQUE (Thunderfist) ~75% → 15% (75/5=15 exact ✓). UNCERTAIN: Agony Mitts 91% → 17% (doesn't fit ceil formula — possible misread of roll). LOW TIER CONFIRMED NO OUTPUT: Spirit Claw (War Wraps, dex_int) 31(27-32)% → NO explicit output (the mod simply vanishes in the conversion).
increased evasion and energy shield.note: FORMULA: ceil(value/5) fits three confirmed data points (67→14, 75→15, 98→20). The 91→17 data point conflicts (ceil(91/5)=19≠17) — the actual Agony Mitts roll may have been ~85% (ceil(85/5)=17). LOW TIER CONFIRMED: 31% (T3, range 27-32) on War Wraps DEX/INT → ZERO explicit output (mod disappears). Previously had two suspected cases; now explicitly confirmed. Threshold: tiers at ≤35% range appear to produce no output. Different base types have different T1 ranges: Vaal Wraps T1≈80-91%, Secured Wraps T1=92-100%, War Wraps T3=27-32%.

increased armour, evasion and energy shi.converted_stat: more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield
increased armour, evasion and energy shi.example: ~150% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield → 19% more Global Evasion Rating and Energy Shield (Sine Aequo unique, 150/8≈18.75≈19)
increased armour, evasion and energy shi.note: Tri-hybrid defence stat (STR/DEX/INT). Different ratio from single stats (÷5 for Evasion, ÷4 for Armour). Confirmed on Sine Aequo at max roll 150% → 19%. Ratio ÷8.

attack speed per 20 dexterity.converted_stat: increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence
attack speed per 20 dexterity.formula: % value preserved; Attack Speed → Area of Effect; DEX scaling → INT scaling
attack speed per 20 dexterity.example: 1% increased Attack Speed per 20 Dexterity → 1% increased Area of Effect per 20 Intelligence
attack speed per 20 dexterity.note: UNIQUE ITEM: Hand of Wisdom and Action. Attribute swaps DEX ↔ INT. Main stat changes Attack Speed → AoE.

lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.converted_stat: Adds Cold Damage to Attacks per 20 Dexterity
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.formula: Lightning → Cold; INT scaling → DEX scaling; damage values change
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.example: Adds 1 to 10 Lightning Damage to Attacks per 20 Intelligence → Adds 6 to 8 Cold Damage to Attacks per 20 Dexterity
lightning damage to attacks per 20 intel.note: UNIQUE ITEM: Hand of Wisdom and Action. Elemental type changes Lightning → Cold. Attribute scaling swaps INT → DEX.

to dexterity.converted_stat: Surpassing chance to fire an additional Projectile
to dexterity.example: RARE T8 (Horror Fist, dex_int): +9(9-12) → 19%. RARE T4 (Skull Clutches, str_dex): +26(25-27) → 39%. RARE T3 (Apocalypse Paw, str_dex): +28(28-30) → 45%. RARE T1 (Eagle Knuckle, dex_int): +35(31-35) → 55%.
to dexterity.note: Flat DEX → % Surpassing chance for additional Projectile. TIER-BASED: ~5% per tier. T8=19%, T4=39%, T3=45%, T1=55%. T3→T4 gap: 6% (45→39). T4 CONFIRMED (Skull Clutches, str_dex: +26, range 25-27). Linear model: T8=19%, T7=24%, T6=29%, T5=34%, T4=39%, T3=45%, T2=50%?, T1=55%. T2 unconfirmed but predicted ≈50%. 'Surpassing' = overflowing hit chance in PoE2. Unique exception: HoWA DEX → % increased Dexterity.

leech of physical attack damage as mana.converted_stat: Leech X% of Physical Attack Damage as Mana + Leech Mana Y% slower
leech of physical attack damage as mana.example: RARE lower (Vengeance Hand, str): 4.22% → 6.93%+24%. RARE T4 (Golem Paw, dex): 5.5(5-5.9%) → 8.53%+25%. RARE T3 (Vengeance Claw, Barbed Bracers dex): 6.72(6-6.9%) → 10.25%+24%. RARE T2 (Sorrow Fingers, dex_int): 7.87(7-7.9%) → 11.24%+21%. RARE T1 (Horror Grasp, dex_int): 8.83% → 12.01%+24%.
split_outputs: Leech Mana Y% slower (varies 21-25%, no clear pattern: T4=25%, T3=24%, T2=21%, T1=24%)
leech of physical attack damage as mana.note: FIVE tiers confirmed. T3(6.72%)→10.25%+24% fills in between T4 and T2. Output increments per tier: T4→T3=+1.72%, T3→T2=+0.99%, T2→T1=+0.77% — irregular spacing (not linear). Penalty 21-25% non-monotone. Ratios: low×1.64, T4×1.55, T3×1.525, T2×1.43, T1×1.36 — decreasing consistently with tier rank.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% of Physical Attack Damage as Mana (+ Leech Mana ~21-25% slower)

leech of physical attack damage as life.converted_stat: Leech X% of Physical Attack Damage as Life + Leech Life Y% slower
leech of physical attack damage as life.example: RARE T1 (Eagle Knuckle, dex_int): 9.68% → 14.46% + 23% slower. RARE T2 (Mind Palm/Damnation Caress): 8.63-8.76% → 12.11-12.43% + 24-25% slower. RARE T3? (Gloom Touch, int): 7.44% → 11.51% + 25% slower. RARE low-tier (Dragon Mitts, dex): 5.17(5-5.9%) → 8.25% + 21% slower.
split_outputs: Leech X% of Physical Attack Damage as Life (higher tier → more %: T1→14.46%, T2→12.11-12.43%, T3?→11.51%, low→8.25%)
Leech Life Y% slower (varies by tier — not strictly monotone: low→21%, T3?→25%, T2→24-25%, T1→23%)
leech of physical attack damage as life.note: Physical life leech → enhanced leech + 'Leech Life slower' penalty. FOUR data points. Penalty does NOT monotonically increase with tier — T3? gives 25% (same as T2 max), T1 gives only 23% (lower than T2). Ratio range: ×1.42-1.60. Matches Soul Knuckle: 'Leech 13.8% + Leech Life 22% slower'. T3? tier range may be 7-7.9% based on 7.44% data point.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% of Physical Attack Damage as Life (+ Leech Life slower)

armour also applies to elemental.example: RARE T1 (Mind Palm, str): +39% of Armour also applies to Elemental Damage → +22% to all Elemental Resistances (CONFIRMED)
armour also applies to elemental.note: STR-base suffix: % Armour→Elemental mitigation → flat +% to all Elemental Resistances (fire+cold+lightning simultaneously). Ratio ~×0.56 (39→22). Very powerful conversion — adds to all 3 elements at once. Only one data point so far.

attribute requirements.formula: CONFLICTING DATA — likely tier-based. 25%(T3)→+17; 35%→+26 (Agony Mitts/Vaal); 35%→+30 (Horror/War). No clean ratio.
attribute requirements.example: RARE T3 (Damnation Clutches, str): 25% reduced → +17 to all Attributes. RARE (Agony Mitts, dex_int): 35% → +26. RARE (Horror Grasp, dex_int): 35% → +30.
attribute requirements.note: Three data points: 25→17, 35→26, 35→30. The two 35% examples give different results (+26 vs +30), possibly due to different base types (Vaal vs War Wraps) or different tiers despite same displayed value. Tier-based is likely. No clean ratio confirmed.

life per enemy killed.converted_stat: Recover X% of maximum Life on Kill
life per enemy killed.formula: VALUE-BASED: floor(flat / 25-26). T3 (+51, range 43-55) → 2%; T1 (+79, range 69-84) → 3%
life per enemy killed.example: RARE T3 (Empyrean Touch, dex_int): +51 → 2% max Life on Kill. RARE T1 (Empyrean Talons, str_dex): +79 → 3% max Life on Kill.
life per enemy killed.note: Flat Life on Kill → % of maximum Life on Kill. TWO DATA POINTS: floor(51/25)=2 ✓, floor(79/25)=3 ✓ (or ÷26: 51/26=1.96→2 ✓, 79/26=3.04→3 ✓). Both ÷25 and ÷26 work — likely ÷25 with floor.

mana per enemy killed.converted_stat: Recover X% of maximum Mana on Kill
mana per enemy killed.formula: TIER-BASED: low tiers (15-21 range values) → 2%; high tier (43) → 3%. ÷14 formula was WRONG — 17/14=1.2→1 but output is 2%.
mana per enemy killed.example: RARE STR-base (Woe Vise, Knightly Mitts): Gain 17(15-20) Mana per Kill → 2%. RARE DEX/INT (Onslaught Caress): Gain 21 Mana per Kill → 2%. RARE DEX/INT (Maelström Talons): Gain 43 Mana per Kill → 3%.
mana per enemy killed.note: TIER-BASED: both STR-base low tier (17, range 15-20) and DEX/INT low-mid tier (21) → 2%. DEX/INT high tier (43) → 3%. The ÷14 formula fails for 17 (gives 1 not 2). Threshold for 3% output is somewhere between 21 and 43 (probably a specific tier boundary). Different base types may have different tier ranges that all map to the same output tier.

increased rarity of items found.converted_stat: increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies
increased rarity of items found.formula: TIER-BASED with base-type dependent ranges. DEX/INT and STR/DEX share T2 range 11-14→22% (confirmed 3 data points). STR base T2 range ~10-12→23% (different range, different output).
increased rarity of items found.example: RARE T2 (Mind Palm, str, 12%)→23%. RARE T2 (Skull Clutches, str_dex, 14%,11-14)→22%. RARE T2 (Spirit Claw, War Wraps dex_int, 13%,11-14)→22% (NEW). RARE T1 (Pain Hold): 16%→28%. RARE T?(Blood Mitts): 16%→29%.
increased rarity of items found.note: Item Rarity → Gold Quantity. FIVE data points. CONFIRMED TIER-BASED: DEX/INT range 11-14 and STR/DEX range 11-14 BOTH → 22% (three items: Skull Clutches 14%→22%, Spirit Claw 13%→22% — same tier, different rolls, same output). STR base (Knightly Mitts) T2 range ≈10-12 → 23% (different tier range, slightly higher output). CONFIRMED: tier ranges vary by base type. Rolled value within the same tier doesn't affect output.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% increased Quantity of Gold Dropped by Slain Enemies

energy shield recharge rate.converted_stat: faster start of Energy Shield Recharge
energy shield recharge rate.example: X% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate → Y% faster start of Energy Shield Recharge (Secured Wraps rare, dex_int, CONFIRMED pattern)
energy shield recharge rate.note: ES Recharge Rate → Faster ES Recharge Start. Confirmed on rare Secured Wraps. Exact ratio unknown.

increased critical damage bonus.formula: TIER-BASED: T1(30-34)→2.84-2.87%; T2(20-24, War Wraps)→1.69%. Value ÷11 fails across tiers (20÷11=1.82≠1.69).
increased critical damage bonus.example: RARE T1 (Secured Wraps, dex_int): 31% → 2.84% Crit Chance. RARE T1 (Vengeance Claw, Barbed Bracers dex): 31(30-34)% → 2.87% Crit Chance. RARE T2 (Spirit Claw, War Wraps dex_int): 20(20-24)% → 1.69% Crit Chance (NEW).
increased critical damage bonus.note: Critical Damage Bonus → flat Critical Hit Chance. TIER-BASED confirmed: T1(range 30-34)→~2.85%, T2(range 20-24)→1.69%. The ÷11 formula from T1 does NOT generalize: 20÷11=1.82≠1.69. Ratios: T1→2.85/31=0.092; T2→1.69/20=0.085 — different per tier. T1 tiny variation (2.84 vs 2.87) across base types may reflect narrow output range. TIER-BASED is the correct model.

to accuracy rating.converted_stat: chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
to accuracy rating.formula: TIER-BASED (PROVEN): T8(33-60)→16%; T3(237-346)→32%; T2(347-450)→34%; T1(451-550)→37%. Tier ranges appear consistent across base types.
to accuracy rating.example: RARE T8 (Golem Paw, dex): +43(33-60) → 16%. RARE T3 (Apocalypse Paw, str_dex): +318(237-346) → 32%. RARE T3 (Eagle Grasp, dex): +258(237-346) → 32% (SAME TIER, DIFFERENT ROLL, SAME OUTPUT — proves tier-based). RARE T2 (Sorrow Fingers, dex_int): +450(347-450) → 34%. RARE T1 (Horror Fist, dex_int): +481(451-550) → 37%.
to accuracy rating.note: TIER-BASED DEFINITIVELY PROVEN: T3 rolled 258 and T3 rolled 318 BOTH give 32% (different rolls, same tier = same output). Tier ranges consistent across STR/DEX (Steelmail), DEX/INT (Adorned/Secured), and DEX (Stalking/Adorned) bases — accuracy tiers may be global. Predicted: T8=16%, T7≈19%, T6≈22%, T5≈25%, T4≈28%, T3=32%, T2=34%, T1=37%.

increased armour and evasion.converted_stat: % of Damage Taken Recouped as Life, Mana and Energy Shield
increased armour and evasion.example: RARE T2 (Empyrean Talons, str_dex): 35(33-38)% increased Armour and Evasion → 7% of Damage Taken Recouped as Life, Mana and ES (floor(35/5)=7 ✓)
increased armour and evasion.note: IMPORTANT: STR/DEX hybrid defence (Armour+Evasion) converts to RECOUP — NOT to % more Global EVA+ES like pure Armour or pure Evasion! Floor(35/5)=7 matches. Same ÷5 formula as small flat Life (<50) Recoup conversion. Single data point.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% of Damage Taken Recouped as Life, Mana and ES

to fire and chaos resistances.converted_stat: +X% to Maximum Fire Resistance + +Y% to Chaos Resistance (Desecrated mod)
to fire and chaos resistances.formula: SPLIT: Fire component → Max Fire bonus (+3%, fixed regardless of value?); Chaos component → flat Chaos ~original+1
to fire and chaos resistances.example: RARE Desecrated (Empyrean Talons, str_dex): +16(13-17)% Fire+Chaos → +3% Max Fire Resistance + +17% Chaos Resistance (CONFIRMED)
split_outputs: +3% to Maximum Fire Resistance (Fire part becomes max bonus — value may always be +3% for Desecrated)
+Y% to Chaos Resistance (Chaos part becomes flat: 16→17, slightly above original)
to fire and chaos resistances.note: DESECRATED MOD. Fire+Chaos splits: Fire→Max Fire bonus, Chaos→flat Chaos. DISCREPANCY: screenshot showed +3% Max Fire (unusual for ≤40 input), but Cold+Chaos gives +2% Max Cold (expected). Possible misread — may actually be +2% Max Fire. Pattern if both +2%: Desecrated dual resist always gives +2% max to elemental part + flat chaos ~original±1. Awaiting another Fire+Chaos example to confirm.

to cold and chaos resistances.converted_stat: +2% to Maximum Cold Resistance + +Y% to Chaos Resistance (Desecrated mod)
to cold and chaos resistances.formula: CONFIRMED: +17(13-17) → +2% Max Cold + +16% Chaos (independent re-roll, 17→16 lost 1)
to cold and chaos resistances.example: RARE Desecrated (Dragon Mitts, dex): +17(13-17)% Cold+Chaos → +2% Max Cold + +16% Chaos Resistance (CONFIRMED)
split_outputs: +2% to Maximum Cold Resistance (Cold part → always +2% max bonus for Desecrated dual resist)
+Y% to Chaos Resistance (Chaos part → flat re-roll within input tier range: 17→16)
to cold and chaos resistances.note: DESECRATED MOD CONFIRMED. Cold+Chaos → Max Cold (+2%) + flat Chaos (~original±1). Max bonus +2% consistent with normal resistance threshold (≤40→+2%). See fire+chaos note — Fire gave +3% which may be a misread; if both give +2% then pattern is consistent.

to strength and dexterity.formula: flat → % increased, ~value × 0.53: T1 (+15, range 9-15) → 8% increased STR+DEX
to strength and dexterity.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Vengeance Hand, str): +15(9-15) Strength and Dexterity → 8% increased Strength and Dexterity (CONFIRMED)
to strength and dexterity.note: DESECRATED MOD. Flat dual attribute → % increased dual attribute (STR+DEX simultaneously). Ratio ~×0.53 (15×0.53=7.95≈8). Similar to HoWA: +20 single DEX → 11% increased DEX (~×0.55). T1 max roll only — need lower tier to confirm tier-based vs value-based.

to strength and intelligence.formula: BY ANALOGY with STR+DEX: flat → % increased, ~value × 0.53. T1 range (9-15) → ~8%?
to strength and intelligence.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy with to strength and dexterity (Desecrated, confirmed ×0.53).
to strength and intelligence.note: DESECRATED MOD (Amanamu). BY ANALOGY with STR+DEX Desecrated which gives % increased STR+DEX. Unconfirmed.

to dexterity and intelligence.formula: BY ANALOGY with STR+DEX: flat → % increased, ~value × 0.53. T1 range (9-15) → ~8%?
to dexterity and intelligence.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy with to strength and dexterity (Desecrated, confirmed ×0.53).
to dexterity and intelligence.note: DESECRATED MOD (Kurgal). BY ANALOGY with STR+DEX Desecrated which gives % increased STR+DEX. Unconfirmed.

to lightning and chaos resistances.converted_stat: +X% to Maximum Lightning Resistance + +Y% to Chaos Resistance (Desecrated mod)
to lightning and chaos resistances.formula: BY ANALOGY with Fire+Chaos: Lightning component → Max Lightning bonus (+3%?); Chaos component → flat Chaos ~original
to lightning and chaos resistances.example: No confirmed example yet. By analogy with Fire+Chaos Desecrated conversion.
split_outputs: +3% to Maximum Lightning Resistance (by analogy with Fire+Chaos)
+Y% to Chaos Resistance (by analogy: flat ~original)
to lightning and chaos resistances.note: BY ANALOGY with to fire and chaos resistances (Desecrated). Unconfirmed — awaiting screenshot.

deflection rating equal to evasion.converted_stat: Prevent +X% of Damage from Deflected Hits
deflection rating equal to evasion.formula: unknown — T1 (22%, range 21-23%) → Prevent 7% Damage from Deflected Hits. Ratio: ~22/3=7.3→7? Or tier-based.
deflection rating equal to evasion.example: RARE T1 (Horror Fist, Adorned Wraps dex_int): Gain Deflection Rating equal to 22(21-23)% of Evasion Rating → Prevent +7% of Damage from Deflected Hits (CONFIRMED)
deflection rating equal to evasion.note: NEW conversion. 'Gain Deflection Rating equal to X% of Evasion Rating' → 'Prevent +Y% of Damage from Deflected Hits'. Deflection mechanic is retained in converted form. Formula: 22→7 (÷3.14, or floor(22/3)=7). Only one data point.

increased mana cost efficiency.formula: value × ~1.43: 7% → 10% (7×1.43=10.0). Single data point — tier-based also possible.
increased mana cost efficiency.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Eagle Grasp, Stalking Bracers dex): 7(6-10)% increased Mana Cost Efficiency → 10% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills (CONFIRMED)
increased mana cost efficiency.note: DESECRATED MOD. Mana cost efficiency → reservation efficiency. Thematic: mana management → skill reservation reduction. Ratio ×10/7≈1.43. T1 range 6-10%, rolled 7. Single data point. 'Reservation Efficiency' is PoE2 term for reduced skill reservation costs.

increased chance to poison.converted_stat: Chance to Poison is calculated from your base chance to inflict Bleeding instead
increased chance to poison.formula: FIXED keystone-like output — input % irrelevant. Any roll (10-30% range) → same fixed mechanic text.
increased chance to poison.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Vengeance Claw, Barbed Bracers dex): 26(20-30)% increased chance to Poison → 'Chance to Poison is calculated from your base chance to inflict Bleeding instead' (CONFIRMED)
increased chance to poison.note: DESECRATED MOD. Poison chance → Poison/Bleeding swap mechanic. The output is a fixed mechanic (not a % value): Poison's base chance is replaced by Bleeding's base chance. If you have 0% Poison but 40% Bleed, your Poison becomes 40%. T1 range 20-30%, rolled 26. The input % value is irrelevant — any roll produces the same text. Builds synergizing both ailments (or those with high bleed chance) benefit most.

increased magnitude of ailments.converted_stat: increased Magnitude of Damaging Ailments you inflict with Critical Hits
increased magnitude of ailments.formula: value × ~1.65 + Critical Hit condition added: 17% → 28% (17×1.65=28.0 exactly)
increased magnitude of ailments.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Woe Vise, Knightly Mitts str): 17(10-20)% increased Magnitude of Ailments you inflict → 28% increased Magnitude of Damaging Ailments you inflict with Critical Hits (CONFIRMED)
increased magnitude of ailments.note: DESECRATED MOD. General ailment magnitude → Damaging Ailment magnitude but gated behind Critical Hits. 'Ailments' (all types, including Slow/Chill/Shock) → 'Damaging Ailments' (Poison/Bleed/Ignite — narrower but higher output). Critical condition is added (not in original). Ratio ×5/3=1.667 (17×5/3=28.33, rounds to 28 — or: 17×1.65=28.05≈28). T1 range 10-20%, rolled 17.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% increased Magnitude of Damaging Ailments with Critical Hits

increased area of effect of curses.converted_stat: Mark Skills have X% increased Use Speed
increased area of effect of curses.formula: value × ~1.67: 15% → 25% (15×1.67=25.0 exactly). Single data point — tier-based also possible.
increased area of effect of curses.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Golem Paw, Barbed Bracers dex): 15(12-20)% increased Area of Effect of Curses → Mark Skills have 25% increased Use Speed (CONFIRMED)
increased area of effect of curses.note: DESECRATED MOD. Curse AoE → Mark Skill use speed. Thematic: curse effectiveness → mark casting efficiency (both are 'curse-like' interactions in PoE2). Ratio exactly ×5/3 (15×5/3=25.0). T1 max roll was 15 out of range 12-20. Single data point.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% increased Use Speed for Mark Skills

of leech is instant.converted_stat: Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life
of leech is instant.formula: FIXED output (keystone-like) — input % value irrelevant. 15(8-15)% → Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life.
of leech is instant.example: RARE Desecrated (Apocalypse Paw, Steelmail Gauntlets str_dex): 15(8-15)% of Leech is Instant → Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life (CONFIRMED)
of leech is instant.note: DESECRATED MOD. 'X% of Leech is Instant' converts to a FIXED keystone-like output: 'Life Leech can Overflow Maximum Life'. Input value (8-15% range) is irrelevant — any roll gives the same output. Overflow Life Leech is a powerful effect: leech continues above max life, acting as a buffer. Confirmed on STR/DEX base (Steelmail). Tier label in game shows 'D' (Desecrated, not a standard tier number).

increased immobilisation buildup.formula: value × ~1.94: 18% → 35% (18×1.94=34.9≈35). Single data point — tier-based also possible.
increased immobilisation buildup.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Agony Hand, Elegant Wraps dex_int): 18(10-20)% increased Immobilisation buildup → 35% increased Damage against Immobilised Enemies (CONFIRMED)
increased immobilisation buildup.note: DESECRATED MOD. Immobilisation buildup chance → Damage against Immobilised enemies. Thematic: building up immobilisation → punish immobilised enemies. Ratio ~×1.94 (≈×2). T1 max roll was 18 (range 10-20). Single data point.

base type implicit survival.converted_stat: PRESERVED — original base type implicits are NOT replaced
base type implicit survival.formula: KEEP: all base type implicits survive Way of the Stonefist conversion; Fists of Stone implicits are ADDED on top
base type implicit survival.example: Elegant Wraps implicit (18% increased Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield) SURVIVED on Agony Hand → appeared as first implicit on converted Fists of Stone item, with +3 EVA/level and +1 ES/level added alongside it (3 total implicit lines)
base type implicit survival.note: CRITICAL: Way of the Stonefist converts EXPLICIT mods only. IMPLICITS from the original base type remain intact. The Fists of Stone implicits (+3 EVA/level + +1 ES/level, or Runeforged variants) are ADDED as additional implicits. Result: Fists of Stone can have 3+ implicit lines (original base implicit + Fists implicits). Only one confirmed example so far (Elegant Wraps), but likely applies to all base types with implicits.

increased cast speed when on full life.converted_stat: increased Attack Speed when on Full Life
increased cast speed when on full life.formula: Cast Speed → Attack Speed (Cast↔Attack swap). 'When on Full Life' condition PRESERVED. Value SCALES UP: 15(8-15)% → 20% (×4/3). Single data point.
increased cast speed when on full life.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Spirit Claw, War Wraps dex_int): 15(8-15)% increased Cast Speed when on Full Life → 20% increased Attack Speed when on Full Life (CONFIRMED)
increased cast speed when on full life.note: DESECRATED MOD. Follows the general Cast↔Attack swap pattern but with 'on Full Life' condition PRESERVED (not stripped or replaced). Value increases: 15→20 (×4/3 ≈ 1.33). CONTRAST with plain 'increased cast speed' → 'increased attack speed' which preserves value exactly. The conditional version scales up the value — possibly because the 'on Full Life' condition is a constraint that rewards higher output, or Desecrated version has its own ratio. T1 range 8-15%, rolled 15 (max roll). Single data point — tier-based possible.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% increased Attack Speed when on Full Life

increased chance to inflict bleeding.converted_stat: Chance to inflict Bleeding is calculated from your base chance to Poison instead
increased chance to inflict bleeding.formula: FIXED keystone-like output — input % irrelevant. Mirror of 'increased chance to poison'.
increased chance to inflict bleeding.example: RARE Desecrated T1 (Skull Clutches, Steelmail Gauntlets str_dex): increased chance to inflict Bleeding → 'Chance to inflict Bleeding is calculated from your base chance to Poison instead' (CONFIRMED)
increased chance to inflict bleeding.note: DESECRATED MOD. AILMENT SYMMETRY CONFIRMED: 'increased chance to Poison' → Poison uses Bleed base chance; 'increased chance to Bleed' → Bleed uses Poison base chance. Both are FIXED mechanic outputs — input % roll is irrelevant. The outputs are exact mirrors: they swap the ailment chance calculation directions. If you have 0% Bleed but 40% Poison, your Bleed becomes 40% (and vice versa for the Poison version). T1 range 20-30%. See also: 'increased chance to poison'.

chance to daze on hit.converted_stat: Gain X% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage against Dazed Enemies
chance to daze on hit.formula: value × ~0.61: 18% → 11% (18×0.61=10.98≈11). Single data point — may be tier-based.
chance to daze on hit.example: RARE Desecrated (Gloom Touch, Grim Gloves INT): 18% chance to Daze Enemies on Hit → Gain 11% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold against Dazed Enemies (CONFIRMED)
chance to daze on hit.note: DESECRATED MOD. Daze chance → Physical-as-Extra-Cold damage bonus against Dazed enemies. Thematic: Daze → Cold damage synergy. Ratio ~×0.61 (18→11). Single data point — tier-based also possible. Applies to all base types that can roll this Desecrated mod.

predict_formula.output_pattern: ~{value}% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold against Dazed Enemies
